result.synthesis_reasoning: All sources converge only weakly on a concrete upstream root cause. The Log Agent finds no error evidence within the time window, suggesting either an absence of faults or unobserved upstream issues. The Topology Agent confirms frontend is connected to many dependencies but does not single out a specific upstream service as the causal source, reinforcing ambiguity. The TCB-RCA engine, however, recommends frontend as a root-cause candidate (depth=0), which is the only element consistently aligned with the symptom service location. Given the priority to consider deeper root causes when supported, but recognizing the lack of corroborating logs and unclear propagation path, frontend remains the sole ranked candidate with weak overall confidence. Prioritization would shift if future logs reveal upstream errors (e.g., in currencyservice or a dependency) or a clear propagation path through the topology.
